release_notes: Second public validation release of Media Experiment Ledger Studio. This beta keeps the successful cross-platform package matrix from beta.1 while replacing the noisy recursive asset export with an exact public allowlist and one consolidated, deterministic evidence bundle. beta.1 remains available as immutable historical release evidence; beta.2 is the recommended download.
features: Cross-platform Electron and Vuetify desktop workspace for local media experiments
Durable image and video import, hashing, proxy generation and resumable jobs
Image and video Atlas evidence with editable report documents and static PDF export
YOLOX and NanoDet-Plus detection with verified built-in decoders and user-supplied ONNX manifests
Credential profiles, media automation budgets, recovery center and update workflows
Windows installer and portable, macOS arm64 and x64, Linux AppImage and deb packages
Exact public Release allowlist that blocks unpacked runtime executables and internal resources
Deterministic consolidated evidence ZIP with four-platform engine, launch, SBOM, notices, build-input and updater metadata
End-to-end public asset verification across checksums, manifest, source SHA and evidence bundle contents
Collision-safe beta.2 publication without editing or clobbering beta.1
